name: Super Distortion
description: Pioneering high-output bridge humbucker with thick boosted mids and fat lows/highs that drives tube amps into overdrive

name: Super 2
description: Bright high-output humbucker that shifts the Super Distortion EQ toward treble for a tighter bottom and snappier top

name: X2N
description: Extreme high-output bridge humbucker with twin wide-bar poles delivering maximum gain and a take-no-prisoners aggressive tone

name: PAF 36th Anniversary Bridge
description: Vintage-voiced bridge humbucker with soft magnetic field and sweet balanced warmth modeled on a 1959 Les Paul reference

name: PAF 36th Anniversary Neck
description: Vintage-voiced neck humbucker companion to the 36th Anniversary Bridge with smooth highs and clear PAF character

name: PAF Master Bridge
description: Quiet bright and dynamic PAF-style bridge humbucker with Alnico 4 magnets delivering snarly vintage rock character

name: PAF Pro
description: Medium-output PAF-voiced humbucker with presence and cut that slices through heavy processing in bridge or neck position

name: Air Norton
description: Warm deep neck humbucker with reduced string-pull for improved sustain and excellent pick-attack dynamics

name: Tone Zone
description: High-output bridge humbucker with wide dynamic range huge bass/low-mid response and dual-resonance coils for rich overtones

name: Norton
description: Medium-output bridge humbucker blending FRED harmonic overtones with Tone Zone midrange power for modern mahogany guitars

name: Evolution Bridge
description: High-output tight aggressive Steve Vai signature bridge humbucker with intense highs and dual-resonance overtone character

name: Evolution Neck
description: Medium-output Steve Vai signature neck humbucker designed for maximum impact and balanced response across the fretboard

name: Evolution 7
description: Seven-string Steve Vai signature humbucker combining Evolution attack with Virtual Vintage technology for clear crunching lows

name: Gravity Storm Bridge
description: Steve Vai signature bridge humbucker with depth warm highs and mids evoking thundering power with dynamic expressiveness

name: Gravity Storm Neck
description: Steve Vai signature neck humbucker with sweet warm tone and a throaty single-coil-like bite within a humbucker body

name: Crunch Lab
description: John Petrucci signature high-output bridge humbucker with big tight articulate sound ideal for progressive metal chords

name: LiquiFire
description: John Petrucci signature neck humbucker with flowing singing solo tone and warm smooth treble for overdriven leads

name: Crunch Lab 7
description: Seven-string version of the Crunch Lab delivering the same tight articulate high-output crunch for 7-string progressive metal

name: LiquiFire 7
description: Seven-string LiquiFire neck humbucker with fat highs and clean lows for smooth solos and tight bass lines

name: Titan Bridge
description: Jake Bowen signature high-output bridge humbucker with tight palm-muted aggression and warm highs suited to modern progressive metal

name: D Activator Bridge
description: Passive bridge humbucker voiced to replicate active-pickup clarity and tight lows without a battery using tuned resonant coils

name: D Activator Neck
description: Passive neck humbucker with big bright open sound and tight lows replicating active-pickup character without battery power

name: D Activator X Bridge
description: High-power passive bridge humbucker combining active-style clarity with wide dynamic range and clean split tones on rolled-back volume

name: D Activator 7 Bridge
description: Seven-string passive bridge humbucker with killer harmonics and attack-focused low B that replicates active clarity without batteries

name: D Activator 7 Neck
description: Seven-string passive neck humbucker with solid low B and singing high strings delivering active-style power in passive form

name: Dominion Bridge
description: Medium-output ceramic bridge humbucker with thick mids and bottom depth maintaining focus for high-gain playing and clean splits

name: Breed Neck
description: Steve Vai signature neck humbucker with fat classic tone slightly louder than a PAF Pro for warm vintage-voiced Jem tones

name: Steve's Special
description: High-output bridge humbucker with a mid-scoop spreading sound over a broad range for note clarity and hi-fi clean chords

name: Fusion Edge Bridge
description: Ibanez-collaboration passive ceramic bridge humbucker with crisp highs tight lows and precise articulation for modern metal

name: Fusion Edge Neck
description: Ibanez-collaboration passive ceramic neck humbucker with clear harmonic character and balanced response for modern high-gain playing

name: Bluesbucker
description: Humbucker-sized pickup with Virtual Vintage technology that replicates P-90 tone and dynamics while canceling 60-cycle hum

name: Area 58
description: Stacked hum-canceling Strat pickup voicing vintage 1958 single-coil dynamics with bright clear tone and wide dynamic range

name: Area 61
description: Stacked hum-canceling Strat pickup that responds strongly to pick attack sounding louder and tougher when played hard

name: Area 67
description: Stacked hum-canceling Strat pickup capturing 1960s chime and quack with light bright 2-and-4-position character

name: Injector Neck
description: Stacked hum-canceling Strat neck pickup warmer and louder than vintage with fast high-gain tracking without thinning out

name: Cruiser Neck
description: Rail hum-canceling Strat neck pickup with open vocal midrange and harmonic overtones that closely mimic true single-coil character

name: Chopper
description: Rail hum-canceling Strat bridge pickup bridging single-coil and humbucker with punchy mids and increased output for a thick tone

name: Pro Track
description: Rail hum-canceling single-coil-sized humbucker with warm vintage PAF tone smooth treble and enough output for any position

name: P90 Super Distortion
description: Highest-output humbucking P-90 soapbar replacement with 12 adjustable pole pieces and smooth treble for high-gain bridge tones
